assignments.name: serperQueries
assignments.value: =["AI SaaS site:linkedin.com/company","agentic AI startup site:linkedin.com/company","workflow automation SaaS site:linkedin.com/company","B2B AI platform site:linkedin.com/company","AI operations startup site:linkedin.com/company"]

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.searchQuery, num: $json.serperNumResults || 8, page: 1, gl: "us", hl: "en" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.founder_search_query, num: 5, page: 1, gl: "us", hl: "en" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.website, formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 30000 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  contents: [{
    parts: [{
      text: "You are helping CognixAI Labs build authentic founder relationships on LinkedIn.

You are NOT writing sales outreach.

Generate thoughtful, observant, founder-to-founder networking messages.

Return STRICT JSON only with:
{
  "icp_score": number,
  "priority": "high|medium|low",
  "summary": "",
  "relationship_angle": "",
  "likely_pain_points": [],
  "connection_note": "",
  "relationship_message": ""
}

Rules:
- connection_note must feel human and natural
- never sound salesy
- never pitch services directly
- sound curious and intelligent
- mention something specific from the company context
- tone should feel like operator-to-operator networking
- connection_note max 260 chars
- relationship_message max 450 chars
- Do NOT invent founder names or LinkedIn URLs — use only provided founder fields
- Do NOT discover founders or guess company facts not in context
- likely_pain_points: array of strings (max 5)
- No markdown. No extra keys." +
        "

Company:
" + ($json.company_name || "") +
        "

Founder:
" + ($json.founder_name || "") +
        "
" + ($json.founder_title || "") +
        "

Website:
" + ($json.website || "") +
        "

LinkedIn:
" + ($json.linkedin_company_url || "") +
        "

Homepage:
" + ($json.scraped_homepage || "").slice(0, 1500) +
        "

Description:
" + ($json.description || "")
    }]
  }],
  generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, responseMimeType: "application/json", maxOutputTokens: 1024 }
}) }}

parameters.content:
## CognixAI Lean Discovery (v3)

Company-intent Serper only. Parse filters junk + title noise. Merges: queryKey / lead_id via Code.
